Our Faculty of Communication Hosted Thailand Srinakharinwirot University

On Friday, October 20, our Faculty of Communication hosted a group of 40 people consisting of the deans and faculty members of the Faculties of Communication, Business Administration and Fine Arts at

Srinakharinwirot University in Thailand

and graduate students of the Department of Communication.

The group that came to Istanbul for a field visit and visited our campus was welcomed by our Faculty Dean

Prof. Dr. Metin Kozak.

After Prof. Kozak gave information about the history of our university, the Rezan Has Museum was visited.

Afterwards, Head of Visual Communication Design Department

and

A lecture on

“Artificial Intelligence Supported Communication Design”

was given by. The visit, in which bilateral cooperation opportunities were also discussed, ended with the presentation of mutual gifts.
